attributes: 1985 West Germany • Eva-Maria Reick Design • Ltd. Ed. #468/5000 • Vinyl & Cloth
condition_notes: New old stock — doll is still in its original plastic, unplayed and pristine. Includes signed Certificate of Authenticity (No. 468 of 5000, dated 1985) and Kanekalon hair-care booklet. Box note: the display box's clear window has separated from the box at one corner; otherwise light box/shelf wear (not factory-sealed/mint box).

ebay.note: Buy It Now + Best Offer; calculated ship + international; 7 photos incl COA. Dolls category, Condition New (sealed NOS), Type Artist Doll, Brand Gustel Wied, Artist Eva-Maria Reick, Country Germany. Custom label RG-0009.
